title: Event-Driven Architecture with Message Queue
scenario: Design an event-driven architecture for a fictional logistics system, using a message queue to handle events and ensure that the system is scalable and fault-tolerant. The LLM output should be a Python script that defines the architecture using the Apache Kafka library. Constraints: The script should not exceed 250 lines, and it should include error handling for message processing.
constraints: Must use the Apache Kafka library

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the code is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
Verify that the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check that the event-driven architecture is implemented correctly.
Verify that the message queue is implemented correctly.
